bench_setup.notes: DAC1→ADC1 single-pin self-loopback on PA4. DAC1_OUT and ADC1_IN4 share the same physical pin — no external wire needed. Tests 4 levels: 0%, 33%, 66%, 100% of 3.3V. ADC reading must be within ±10% of DAC value. detail0=last ADC reading (~4095 at 100%).

peripheral_signals.notes: PA4 = DAC1_OUT = ADC1_IN4. Analog mode. No external wire needed.
